summary: Completed testing of Internal Chatbot for Customer Support. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements and chatbot flows verified working. Chatbot floats bottom-left, opens/closes correctly, displays welcome message and quick questions, handles FAQ responses with appropriate categories, triggers 'needs human' for unknown questions, and supports human support requests.

minor.issue: Arabic alif variants not normalized - 'كيف أصبح بائع؟' (with أ) doesn't match pattern 'كيف اصبح بائع' (with ا). Users may not get expected responses if using different alif forms.

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/chatbot/quick-questions returns 7 questions with text and icon
✅ Backend: Quick questions include expected items (أين طلبي؟, طرق الدفع, تكلفة الشحن)
✅ Backend: POST /api/chatbot/send handles order tracking question (category: orders)
✅ Backend: POST /api/chatbot/send handles returns question (category: returns)
✅ Backend: POST /api/chatbot/send handles payment question (category: payment)
✅ Backend: POST /api/chatbot/send handles shipping question (category: shipping)
✅ Backend: POST /api/chatbot/send handles become seller question (category: seller)
✅ Backend: POST /api/chatbot/send handles become driver question (category: delivery)
✅ Backend: Unknown question triggers needs_human=true and category=unknown
✅ Backend: Greeting message works (السلام عليكم -> category: greeting)
✅ Backend: Session ID persistence across messages
✅ Backend: POST /api/chatbot/request-support creates support request
✅ Backend: POST /api/chatbot/send requires authentication (401 without token)
✅ Backend: POST /api/chatbot/request-support requires authentication (401)
✅ Backend: GET /api/chatbot/quick-questions is public (no auth required)
✅ Frontend: Chatbot NOT visible when user is not logged in
✅ Frontend: Chatbot toggle button visible after login (data-testid='chatbot-toggle')
✅ Frontend: Chatbot positioned bottom-left (bottom-20 left-4)
✅ Frontend: Click chatbot button opens chat window
✅ Frontend: Chat window shows header 'مساعد تريند سورية'
✅ Frontend: Welcome message shows user name 'مرحباً عميل تجريبي! 👋'
✅ Frontend: Quick questions displayed (أين طلبي؟, كيف أرجع منتج؟, طرق الدفع, etc.)
✅ Frontend: Clicking quick question sends message and shows bot response
✅ Frontend: Bot response shows quick reply buttons for follow-up questions
✅ Frontend: Typing message and sending works correctly
✅ Frontend: Unknown question shows 'لم أفهم سؤالك' response
✅ Frontend: 'التحدث مع موظف دعم' button visible after messages
✅ Frontend: Request human support shows confirmation message
✅ Frontend: Close button (X) closes chat window
critical_code_review_comments: Chatbot.js correctly uses data-testid='chatbot-toggle' for testing
Chatbot.js uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for API calls
Chatbot correctly checks 'if (!user) return null' to hide for non-logged users
Backend FAQ_RESPONSES covers all major categories (orders, returns, payment, shipping, seller, delivery, account, greeting)
DEFAULT_RESPONSE properly sets needs_human=True via category='unknown'
Session management works correctly with session_id persistence
Support request creates db record in support_requests collection

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements display and chatbot flows work correctly

seed_data_creation: Chat messages and support requests created during testing in chat_messages and support_requests collections
context_for_next_testing_agent: Internal Chatbot feature fully tested and working. Chatbot button positioned bottom-left with data-testid='chatbot-toggle'. FAQ responses cover: orders (tracking, cancel, delay), returns, payments, shipping, becoming seller/driver, account issues. Unknown questions trigger needs_human=true. Human support requests saved to support_requests collection. Chatbot only visible to logged-in users. API tests in /app/backend/tests/test_chatbot.py

list: Payment gateway (Sham Cash) - accepts any 6-digit OTP

chat_window.header: مساعد تريند سورية - نحن هنا لمساعدتك

faq_categories.returns: سياسة الإرجاع، تكلفة الشحن، منتج تالف
faq_categories.payment: طرق الدفع، شحن المحفظة، مشاكل الدفع

api_endpoints./api/chatbot/send: POST - Requires auth, processes message and returns response
api_endpoints./api/chatbot/request-support: POST - Requires auth, creates human support request
api_endpoints./api/chatbot/history: GET - Requires auth, returns chat history
api_endpoints./api/chatbot/admin/support-requests: GET - Admin only, lists support requests
